description: Style Note Perfect for your kid's winter needs, this jacket from gini and jony is designed to offer exemplary warmth. Layer it over tees or tops, team it with sports shoes and a cap for a sporty look. Product Details Black hooded jacket, is sleeveless, has a mock neck with a zipper on the front, contrast panelling around the armholes, embroidered branding on the left chest and print on the right chest, appliqué and printing at the back and contrast panelling on the ribbed hem Material and Care 100% cotton  Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry, bleach or soak Wash and dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron on print/embroidery
